name: Devilled Crab in Tomato.
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the tomatoes. Cut each tomato in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds and pulp.
2. Mix all remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Fill the tomato halves with the mixture.
4. Arrange the filled tomato halves on a platter, on a bed of lettuce leaves.
5. Decorate with mint leaves.
